verses.geez:
ወተንሥአ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ምስለ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ንዋዩ ፡ ወበጽሑ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ መሐላ ፡ ወሦዐ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ለአምላከ ፡
                  ይስሐቅ ፡ አቡሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Israel departed, he and all that he had, and came to the well of the oath; and he offered sacrifice to the God of his father Isaac.
translations.kjv: And Israel took his journey with all that he had, and came to Beersheba, and offered sacrifices unto the God of his father Isaac.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ በሕልም ፡ አምላከ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በሌሊት ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ምንትኑ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And God spoke to Israel in a night vision, saying, Jacob, Jacob; and he said, What is it?
translations.kjv: And God spake unto Israel in the visions of the night, and said, Jacob, Jacob. And he said, Here am I.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ አነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አምላከ ፡ አቡከ ፤ ኢትፍራህ ፡ ወሪደ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ እስመ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ እሬስየከ ፡
                  በህየ ።

translations.lxx: And he says to him, I am the God of thy fathers; fear not to go down into Egypt, for I will make thee there a great nation.
translations.kjv: And he said, I am God, the God of thy father: fear not to go down into Egypt; for I will there make of thee a great nation:

verses.geez:
ወአነ ፡ እወርድ ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወአነ ፡ እሄሉ ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ ዘልፈ ፡ ወዮሴፍ ፡ ይከድነከ ፡
                  አዕይንቲከ ።

translations.lxx: And I will go down with thee into Egypt, and I will bring thee up at the end; and Joseph shall put his hands on thine eyes.
translations.kjv: I will go down with thee into Egypt; and I will also surely bring thee up again: and Joseph shall put his hand upon thine eyes.

verses.geez:
ወተንሥአ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ መሐላ ፡ ወነሥእዎ ፡ ደቂቁ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ አቡሆሙ ፡ ወንዋዮሙሂ
                  ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ወአንስቲያሆሙሂ ፡ ወጸዐኑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሰረገላ ፡ ዘፈነወ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ በዘ ፡ ያምጽእዎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob rose up from the well of the oath; and the sons of Israel took up their father, and the baggage, and their wives on the waggons, which Joseph sent to take them.
translations.kjv: And Jacob rose up from Beersheba: and the sons of Israel carried Jacob their father, and their little ones, and their wives, in the wagons which Pharaoh had sent to carry him.

verses.geez:
ወነሥኡ ፡ ንዋዮሙ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ጥሪቶሙ ፡ ዘአጥረዩ ፡ በምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ወቦአ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡
                  ዘርኡ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፤

translations.lxx: And they took up their goods, and all their property, which they had gotten in the land of Chanaan; they came into the land of Egypt, Jacob, and all his seed with him.
translations.kjv: And they took their cattle, and their goods, which they had gotten in the land of Canaan, and came into Egypt, Jacob, and all his seed with him:

verses.geez: ደቂቁ ፡ ወደቂቀ ፡ ደቂቁ ፡ ወአዋልዲሁ ፡ ወአዋልደ ፡ አዋልዲሁ ፡ ምስሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: The sons, and the sons of his sons with him; his daughters, and the daughters of his daughters; and he brought all his seed into Egypt.
translations.kjv: His sons, and his sons’ sons with him, his daughters, and his sons’ daughters, and all his seed brought he with him into Egypt.

verses.geez: ወከመዝ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እለ ፡ ቦኡ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ በኵሩ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ሩቤል ።

translations.lxx: And these are the names of the sons of Israel that went into Egypt with their father Jacob—Jacob and his sons. The first-born of Jacob, Ruben.
translations.kjv: And these are the names of the children of Israel, which came into Egypt, Jacob and his sons: Reuben, Jacob’s firstborn.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ሩቤል ፡ [*ሄኖኅ ፡ ወፍሉስ ፡ ወአስሮን ፡ ወከርሚ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Ruben; Enoch, and Phallus, Asron, and Charmi.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Reuben; Hanoch, and Phallu, and Hezron, and Carmi.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ስምዖን ፡ የሙኤል ፡ ወያሚን ፡ ወአኦድ ፡ ወያክን ፡ ወሳኦር ፡ ወሰኡል ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ ከናናዊት ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Symeon; Jemuel, and Jamin, and Aod, and Achin, and Saar, and Saul, the son of a Chananitish woman.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Simeon; Jemuel, and Jamin, and Ohad, and Jachin, and Zohar, and Shaul the son of a Canaanitish woman.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ሌዊ ፡ ገርሶን ፡ ወቃዓት ፡ ወሜራሪ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Levi; Gerson, Cath, and Merari.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Levi; Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

verses.geez:
ወደቂቀ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ዔር ፡ ወአውናን ፡ ወሴሎም ፡ ወፋሬሰ ፡ ወዛራ ፡ ወሞተ ፡ ዔር ፡ ወአውናን ፡ በምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፤
                  ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ፋሬስ ፡ ኤስሮም ፡ ወይሞሔል ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Judas; Er, and Aunan, and Selom, and Phares, and Zara: and Er and Aunan died in the land of Chanaan.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Judah; Er, and Onan, and Shelah, and Pharez, and Zarah: but Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan. And the sons of Pharez were Hezron and Hamul.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ይሳኮር ፡ ቶላዕ ፡ ወፎሐ ፡ ወያሱብ ፡ ወስምራ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Phares were Esron, and Jemuel. And the sons of Issachar; Thola, and Phua, and Asum, and Sambran.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Issachar; Tola, and Phuvah, and Job, and Shimron.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ዛቡሎን ፡ ሳሬድ ፡ ወአሎን ፡ ወአሌል*] ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Zabulun, Sered, and Allon, and Achoel.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Zebulun; Sered, and Elon, and Jahleel.

verses.geez:
ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ልያ ፡ ዘወለደት ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ በምስጴጦምያ ፡ ዘሶርያ ፡ ወዲና ፡ ወለቱ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ነፍስ
                  ፡ ደቅ ፡ ወአዋልድ ፡ ሠላሳ ፡ ወሠለስቱ ።

translations.lxx: These are the sons of Lea, which she bore to Jacob in Mesopotamia of Syria, and Dina his daughter; all the souls, sons and daughters, thirty-three.
translations.kjv: These be the sons of Leah, which she bare unto Jacob in Padanaram, with his daughter Dinah: all the souls of his sons and his daughters were thirty and three.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ጋድ ፡ [*ሰፎን ፡ ወሕግ ፡ ወሱኒ ፡ ወአዜን ፡ ወኣድ ፡ ወአሮሐድ ፡ ወአሪሔል ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Gad; Saphon, and Angis, and Sannis, and Thasoban, and Aedis, and Aroedis, and Areelis.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Gad; Ziphion, and Haggi, Shuni, and Ezbon, Eri, and Arodi, and Areli.

verses.geez:
ወደቂቀ ፡ አሴር ፡ ኢያምን ፡ ወኢያሱ ፡ ወኢዩል ፡ ወባርያ ፡ ወሳራ ፡ እኅቶሙ ፡ ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ባርያ ፡
                  ኮቦር ፡ ወሜልኪየል*] ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Aser; Jemna, Jessua, and Jeul, and Baria, and Sara their sister. And the sons of Baria; Chobor, and Melchiil.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Asher; Jimnah, and Ishuah, and Isui, and Beriah, and Serah their sister: and the sons of Beriah; Heber, and Malchiel.

verses.geez:
ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዘለፋ ፡ እንተ ፡ ወሀባ ፡ ለልያ ፡ ላባ ፡ ወይእቲ ፡ ዘወለደት ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ዐሠርቱ ፡
                  ወስድስቱ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ እሙንቱ ።

translations.lxx: These are the sons of Zelpha, which Laban gave to his daughter Lea, who bore these to Jacob, sixteen souls.
translations.kjv: These are the sons of Zilpah, whom Laban gave to Leah his daughter, and these she bare unto Jacob, even sixteen souls.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ራሔል ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ወብንያም ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Rachel, the wife of Jacob; Joseph, and Benjamin.
translations.kjv: The sons of Rachel Jacob’s wife; Joseph, and Benjamin.

verses.geez:
ወተወልዱ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ ደቂቅ ፡ በብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ምናሴ ፡ ወኤፍሬም ፤ ወደቂቀ ፡ ምናሴ ፡ ዘወለደት ፡ ሎቱ ፡
                  ዕቅብቱ ፡ ሶርያዊት ፡ [*ማኪር ፡ ወማኪር ፡ ወለዶ ፡ ለገለአድ ፤*] ወደቂቀ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ እኁሁ ፡ ለምናሴ ፡ [*ሱታላ ፡
                  ወጠኀን ፡ ወደቂቀ ፡ ሱታለ ፡ ኤዴን ።*]

translations.lxx: And there were sons born to Joseph in the land of Egypt, whom Aseneth, the daughter of Petephres, priest of Heliopolis, bore to him, even Manasses and Ephraim. And there were sons born to Manasses, which the Syrian concubine bore to him, even Machir. And Machir begot Galaad. And the sons of Ephraim, the brother of Manasses; Sutalaam, and Taam. And the sons of Sutalaam; Edom.
translations.kjv: And unto Joseph in the land of Egypt were born Manasseh and Ephraim, which Asenath the daughter of Potipherah priest of On bare unto him.

verses.geez:
ወደቂቀ ፡ ብንያም ፡ [*ባዕል ፡ ወቦኮር ፡ ወአሲቤር ፡ ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ባዕል ፡ ጌራ ፡ ወኖሔማን ፡ ወኤሒ
                  ፡ ወሮስ ፡ ወመፊም ፡*] ወጌራ ፡ ወለዶ ፡ ለአራድ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Benjamin; Bala, and Bochor, and Asbel. And the sons of Bala were Gera, and Noeman, and Anchis, and Ros, and Mamphim. And Gera begot Arad.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Benjamin were Belah, and Becher, and Ashbel, Gera, and Naaman, Ehi, and Rosh, Muppim, and Huppim, and Ard.

verses.geez: ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ራሔል ፡ ዘወለደት ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ዐሠርቱ ፡ ወሰማኒቱ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: These are the sons of Rachel, which she bore to Jacob; all the souls eighteen.
translations.kjv: These are the sons of Rachel, which were born to Jacob: all the souls were fourteen.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ዳን ፡ አሳ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Dan; Asom.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Dan; Hushim.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ንፍታሌም ፡ [*አሴሔል ፡ ወጎሂን ፡ ወዬሴር ፡ ወሴሌም*] ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Nephthalim; Asiel, and Goni, and Issaar, and Sollem.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Naphtali; Jahzeel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shillem.

verses.geez:
እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ባላ ፡ እንተ ፡ ወሀባ ፡ ላባ ፡ ለራሔል ፡ ወለቱ ፡ ወወለደቶሙ ፡ ለእሉ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ወኵሉ
                  ፡ ነፍስ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ ዘወለደት ፡ ባላ ።

translations.lxx: These are the sons of Balla, whom Laban gave to his daughter Rachel, who bore these to Jacob; all the souls, seven.
translations.kjv: These are the sons of Bilhah, which Laban gave unto Rachel his daughter, and she bare these unto Jacob: all the souls were seven.

verses.geez: ወኵሉ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ ዘቦአ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ አንስት ፡ ስሳ ፡ [ወስድስቱ ።]

translations.lxx: And all the souls that came with Jacob into Egypt, who came out of his loins, besides the wives of the sons of Jacob, even all the souls were sixty-six.
translations.kjv: All the souls that came with Jacob into Egypt, which came out of his loins, besides Jacob’s sons’ wives, all the souls were threescore and six;

verses.geez:
ወደቂቀ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ እለ ፡ ተወልዱ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ በብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ [ሰባዕቱ ፡] ወኮነ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ እንተ ፡ ቦአት
                  ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ሰብዓ ፡ ወኀምስቱ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Joseph, who were born to him in the land of Egypt, were nine souls; all the souls of the house of Jacob who came with Joseph into Egypt, were seventy-five souls.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Joseph, which were born him in Egypt, were two souls: all the souls of the house of Jacob, which came into Egypt, were threescore and ten.

verses.geez:
ወለይሁዳሰ ፡ ፈነዎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትቀበሎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ራሜስ ፡ እንተ ፡ ስማ ፡
                  ቃቴሮአስ ።

translations.lxx: And he sent Judas before him to Joseph, to meet him to the city of Heroes, into the land of Ramesses.
translations.kjv: And he sent Judah before him unto Joseph, to direct his face unto Goshen; and they came into the land of Goshen.

verses.geez:
ወአንሥአ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ሰረገላቲሁ ፡ ወሖረ ፡ ይትቀበሎ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ቃቴሮአስ ፡ ወሶበ ፡
                  ረከቦ ፡ ሐቀፎ ፡ ክሳዶ ፡ ወበከየ ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ ብካየ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph having made ready his chariots, went up to meet Israel his father, at the city of Heroes; and having appeared to him, fell on his neck, and wept with abundant weeping.
translations.kjv: And Joseph made ready his chariot, and went up to meet Israel his father, to Goshen, and presented himself unto him; and he fell on his neck, and wept on his neck a good while.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ እምይእዜሰ ፡ ለእሙት ፡ እንከ ፡ እስመ ፡ ርኢኩ ፡ ገጸከ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ሕያው ፡ አንተ ።

translations.lxx: And Israel said to Joseph, After this I will gladly die, since I have seen thy face, for thou art yet living.
translations.kjv: And Israel said unto Joseph, Now let me die, since I have seen thy face, because thou art yet alive.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ለአኀዊሁ ፡ አሐውር ፡ እንግሮ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወእብሎ ፡ አኅዊየ ፡ ወቤተ ፡ አቡየ ፡ እለ ፡ ሀለዉ
                  ፡ ምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ መጽኡ ፡ ኀቤየ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph said to his brethren, I will go up and tell Pharao, and will say to him, My brethren, and my father's house, who were in the land of Chanaan, are come to me.
translations.kjv: And Joseph said unto his brethren, and unto his father’s house, I will go up, and shew Pharaoh, and say unto him, My brethren, and my father’s house, which were in the land of Canaan, are come unto me;

verses.geez: ወኖሎተ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ንዋዮሙኒ ፡ ወላህሞሙኒ ፡ አምጽኡ ።

translations.lxx: And the men are shepherds; for they have been feeders of cattle, and they have brought with them their cattle, and their kine, and all their property.
translations.kjv: And the men are shepherds, for their trade hath been to feed cattle; and they have brought their flocks, and their herds, and all that they have.

verses.geez: ወእመ ፡ ጸውዐክሙ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወይቤለክሙ ፡ ምንት ፡ ተግባርክሙ ፤

translations.lxx: If then Pharao call you, and say to you, What is your occupation?
translations.kjv: And it shall come to pass, when Pharaoh shall call you, and shall say, What is your occupation?

verses.geez:
በልዎ ፡ ኖሎተ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ አግብርቲከ ፡ እምንእስነ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይእዜ ፡ ወአበዊነሂ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ክመ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ትኅድሩ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ጌሴም ፡ እንተ ፡ ዓረብ ፡ እስመ ፡ ያስቆርርዎሙ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ኖሎተ ፡ አባግዕ ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall say, We thy servants are herdsmen from our youth until now, both we and our fathers: that ye may dwell in the land of Gesem of Arabia, for every shepherd is an abomination to the Egyptians.
translations.kjv: That ye shall say, Thy servants’ trade hath been about cattle from our youth even until now, both we, and also our fathers: that ye may dwell in the land of Goshen; for every shepherd is an abomination unto the Egyptians.
